title: Supreme Court dismisses Fox Mandal’s plea over ₹3.9 crore service tax dispute
description: The Supreme Court on Wednesday dismissed a plea filed by law firm Fox Mandal & Co challenging the scope of remand ordered by the Customs, Excise and Service Tax Appellate Tribunal (CESTAT) in a ₹3.9 crore service tax dispute under the pre-GST regime.A Bench of Justices PS Narasimha and Alok Aradhe declined to interfere with the tribunal’s order, holding that no case was made out to expand or revisit the remand at the stage of a special leave petition.Justice PS Narasimha and Justice Alok Ara
